headline: Jimmy Dean® Protein Lineup Expands with New Bowls Featuring 40 Grams of Protein
summary: SPRINGDALE, Ark., March 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As consumers increasingly prioritize protein, the Jimmy Dean® brand is introducing a new lineup of high protein options that deliver up to 40 grams of protein per serving. The new items give shoppers an approachable way to meet their protein goals with convenient options in the frozen aisle where they already turn for quick, satisfying meals. The Jimmy Dean protein focused portfolio expands well beyond breakfast, offering high-protein options
